description: Configure the Bologna Acosta simulation to output macroscopic edge data and generate a spatial speed heatmap. Create an additional file at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/edgedata.add.xml to output traffic metrics to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/edge_metrics.xml with a frequency of 1000 seconds. Create a SUMO configuration file at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/run_heatmap.sumocfg using the Acosta network (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/acosta_buslanes.net.xml), routes (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/acosta_vtypes.add.xml, /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/acosta.rou.xml, /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/acosta_busses.rou.xml), and the new additional file, with a simulation end time of 1000. Run the simulation and develop a Python script at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/plot_heatmap.py that parses the edge metrics and uses sumolib to map average speeds to the network geometry. The script should generate a spatial speed heatmap and save the figure to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/speed_heatmap.png.
